defaultRoutes.purpose: Establish clinical trust, give a treatment overview, surface credentials and route the visitor towards an appointment within the first scroll.

List the treatments the clinic offers with plain-language descriptions, indicative duration and price ranges where appropriate. The page that turns 'I have a problem' into 'I should book this appointment'.
Tell the story behind the clinic — founders, philosophy, length of practice, room and team — so the visitor recognises a competent, human caregiver, not a faceless brand.
Phone, email, opening hours, address and a clear path to booking. Doubles as the practical-info page so a visitor in pain can find it without scrolling.

optionalRoutes.when: the clinic has more than three named clinicians whose individual credentials carry conversion weight
the clinic answers the same handful of patient questions repeatedly (insurance, referrals, what to bring, anaesthesia)
the clinic publishes transparent prices per treatment as a deliberate trust signal
